fields.name: creationDate
fields.description: The creation date or creation date range of the activity

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: The end date pf the activity (copy of the date associated to the SUCCEEDED or FAILED stage)

fields.name: itemsPerPage
fields.description: Number of requested items per page

fields.name: payload
fields.description: The copy of the origin user request. It could be the whole object or only some elements.

fields.name: sortBy
fields.description: Unbounded list or parameters to sort by. The '+' indicates ascendant ordering, the '-' indicates descendant ordering. If not precised, default to '+'

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: The start date of the activity (date of the first stage that is not QUEUED)

fields.name: startIndex
fields.description: The index of the first item present in the response

fields.name: status
fields.description: The status or status list (comma separated list) of the activity.
